title: Design Agent by Lokuma
description_en: Lokuma Design Agent, is an AI designer your agents can call, a design intelligence layer for agents like OpenClaw, Claude Code, or Codex. AI can generate almost anything. But generation isn’t design. Turning raw outputs into something clear, structured, and visually refined still requires design thinking. Built by design tool makers, Lokuma helps AI reason about layout, typography, and visual balance — transforming outputs into landing pages, websites, and campaign pages that feel designed.
description_zh: Lokuma 设计代理（Lokuma Design Agent）是一名可供你的代理调用的 AI 设计师，是面向 OpenClaw、Claude Code 或 Codex 等代理的设计智能层。AI 几乎可以生成任何东西，但“生成”并不等于“设计”。将原始输出转化为清晰、有结构且视觉精致的内容，仍然需要设计思维。Lokuma 由设计工具的开发者打造，帮助 AI 在布局、排版与视觉平衡方面进行推理——把输出转化为真正“经过设计”的落地页、网站与营销活动页面。

title: Claude Cowork Projects
description_en: Projects in Claude Cowork bring your tasks, files, instructions, and memory into one focused workspace on your desktop. Built for individuals and teams managing complex workflows, it keeps everything local, organized, and reusable so you can work faster with consistent context across tasks.
description_zh: Claude Cowork 中的项目（Projects）将你的任务、文件、指令和记忆整合到桌面端一个专注的工作空间中。它专为管理复杂工作流的个人与团队打造，使一切都保持在本地、井然有序且可复用，从而让你在各项任务间始终保持一致的上下文，更快速地完成工作。

title: Fractal
description_en: Fractal is the fastest way to ship exceptional ChatGPT apps. ChatGPT is becoming the AI app store, and those who ship first and iterate fastest will capture the opportunity. Fractal handles architecture planning, coding, testing, and deployment so you can focus on building something people love. Build exceptional ChatGPT apps in minutes, not weeks.
description_zh: Fractal 是以最快速度交付卓越 ChatGPT 应用的方式。ChatGPT 正在成为 AI 应用商店，那些最先发布并最快迭代的人将抓住这一机遇。Fractal 覆盖架构规划、编码、测试与部署，让你可以专注于打造人们喜爱的产品。用分钟而不是数周构建卓越的 ChatGPT 应用。

title: Vite+
description_en: Vite+ is a new unified toolchain and entry point to web application development. Manage your runtime, package manager, and frontend stack with one tool. curl -fsSL https://vite.plus | bash
description_zh: Vite+ 是一款全新的、统一的 Web 应用开发工具链与入口。用一个工具即可管理你的运行时、包管理器以及前端技术栈。`curl -fsSL https://vite.plus | bash`

title: Cursor Glass
description_en: Cursor Glass introduces a unified interface for managing agents, repositories, and cloud tasks in one place. With Cloud Handoff, agents can seamlessly switch between local machines and cloud environments mid-task, eliminating workflow breaks. Powered by Composer 2, it delivers strong coding performance at lower cost. Built for engineers running parallel agents, Glass reduces context-switching and brings real visibility.
description_zh: Cursor Glass 推出一个统一界面，可在同一处管理智能体（agents）、代码仓库（repositories）和云端任务（cloud tasks）。借助 Cloud Handoff，智能体可在任务进行中无缝在本地机器与云环境之间切换，消除工作流中断。由 Composer 2 驱动，它以更低成本提供强劲的代码能力。面向运行并行智能体的工程师而打造，Glass 减少上下文切换，并带来真正的可视化与透明度。

title: Contral
description_en: Contral - The IDE that teaches you while you build. With Build Mode, you apply everything independently with context aware assistance that supports your thinking. Build with AI agents and learn along the way as you build. With Learn Mode, learn specific languages. You get step by step guidance, real time explanations, and direction as you work on actual tasks. 200+ developers are already on the waitlist. This is the first step towards changing how developers learn.
description_zh: Contral——一款在你构建的同时教你学习的 IDE。通过“构建模式”（Build Mode），你可以在具备上下文感知的辅助支持下独立完成所有内容，帮助你理清思路。与 AI 代理（AI agents）一起构建，并在构建过程中一路学习。通过“学习模式”（Learn Mode），学习特定编程语言：你将获得分步骤指导、实时讲解和方向引导，并在处理真实任务时同步推进。已有 200+ 名开发者加入候补名单。这是改变开发者学习方式的第一步。

title: murmur
description_en: Dreading a phone call? Practice it first. Murmur is an iOS app that lets you rehearse real-life phone calls with AI before making them for real. Call your doctor about test results, negotiate rent, prep for a job interview, or handle a difficult return - in a safe, judgment-free space. Pick a scenario (40+ built-in, or create your own), have a real voice conversation with AI, get instant feedback on what you said and how to improve. Not a chatbot - a real voice call simulator with AI coaching.
description_zh: 害怕打电话？先练习一下。Murmur 是一款 iOS 应用，让你在真正拨打之前，先用 AI 预演现实生活中的电话通话。你可以给医生打电话询问检查结果、协商房租、为求职面试做准备，或处理棘手的退货——在一个安全、无评判的环境里进行练习。选择一个场景（内置 40+ 种，或自行创建），与 AI 进行真实的语音对话，并即时获得关于你说了什么以及如何改进的反馈。这不是聊天机器人——而是一款带 AI 教练的真实语音通话模拟器。

title: Replit Agent 4
description_en: Replit Agent 4 is the first AI built for creative collaboration between humans and agents. Design on an infinite canvas, work with your team, run parallel agents, and ship working apps, sites, slides & more, it removes busywork so you can stay in flow and create faster. Submit requests in any order, and Agent 4 intelligently sequences them and executes in the best order. Creative flow, protected.
description_zh: Replit Agent 4 是首个专为人类与智能体之间的创意协作打造的 AI。你可以在无限画布上进行设计，与团队协作，运行并行智能体，交付可用的应用、网站、演示文稿等；它能消除繁琐的事务性工作，让你保持心流、更快创作。你可以按任意顺序提交需求，Agent 4 会智能地对它们进行编排，并以最佳顺序执行。创意心流，得到守护。

title: Novi Notes
description_en: Novi Notes is a local-first Mac note app with built-in AI via MCP. Just install, open Claude, and ask — Claude reads and writes your notes directly. No plugins, no API keys, no config. Features: AI-native via MCP, 100% local and offline, daily notes, manuals, post-its & calendar, one-time purchase with no subscription. Built by an indie dev in Seoul.
description_zh: Novi Notes 是一款本地优先（local-first）的 Mac 笔记应用，通过 MCP 内置 AI。只需安装后打开 Claude 并提问——Claude 就能直接读取并写入你的笔记。无需插件、无需 API Key、无需配置。功能包括：通过 MCP 实现 AI 原生（AI-native）、100% 本地与离线、每日笔记、手册、便签（post-its）与日历、一次性购买无订阅。由首尔的一位独立开发者打造。

title: Sanota
description_en: Publishing family history shouldn't take years. Sanota lets you publish stories one by one as they are ready, connecting loved ones today instead of just preserving the past. A conversational AI uncovers meaningful details and crafts each story in a tone most suitable for you. Co-create memories from multiple perspectives. Record in your browser or via a standard phone call so no smart devices are needed. The result? Stories, beautifully crafted.
description_zh: 发布家族史不该耗费数年。Sanota 让你在每个故事准备好时就能逐篇发布，把今天的亲人连接在一起，而不只是保存过去。一款对话式 AI 会挖掘有意义的细节，并以最适合你的语气打磨每个故事。支持从多重视角共同创作回忆。你可以在浏览器中录制，或通过标准电话通话录制，无需任何智能设备。结果呢？一个个精心雕琢的故事。

title: Caplo
description_en: Caplo brings real-time AI captions & translation to any iOS app. it captures system audio to provide live subtitles in a floating Picture-in-Picture (PiP) window—perfect for foreign streams, meetings, or anime. • Floating PiP: Overlays any app you use. • 12+ Languages: English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, etc. • Universal: Works with YouTube, Zoom, Netflix & more. • AI-Powered: Fast and accurate transcription. Break the language barrier on your iPhone!
description_zh:
Caplo 为任意 iOS 应用带来实时 AI 字幕与翻译。它可捕获系统音频，在悬浮的 画中画（PiP）窗口中提供实时字幕——非常适合观看外语直播、参加会议或追番。  
• 悬浮 PiP：覆盖你正在使用的任何应用。  
• 12+ 种语言：英语、日语、中文、西班牙语等。  
• 通用：支持 YouTube、Zoom、Netflix 等更多平台。  
• AI 驱动：转写快速且准确。  
在 iPhone 上打破语言障碍！

title: Everest AI
description_en: Everest C1 is the world’s most powerful ARM64 server APU, built for engineers who demand uncompromising performance. Driven by the Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme with 18 cores at 5 GHz, 128 GB unified memory, 80+ AI TOPS NPU, and enterprise IPMI. Silent, under 75 W, and Kubernetes‑native. The C1 delivers AI inference, edge clusters, and sovereign infrastructure at a fraction of cloud costs.
description_zh: Everest C1 是全球最强大的 ARM64 服务器 APU，专为追求毫不妥协性能的工程师打造。其搭载 Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme，18 核 5 GHz，配备 128 GB 统一内存、80+ AI TOPS 的 NPU，以及企业级 IPMI。静音运行、功耗低于 75 W，并原生支持 Kubernetes。C1 能以远低于云成本的代价，提供 AI 推理、边缘集群与主权基础设施能力。

title: dailytips.dev
description_en: A 5-minute daily read on decisions, logic, distribution, and the thinking that turns code into products people use. dailytips.dev is a free daily newsletter for developers who want to get better at everything that happens around the code.
description_zh: 每天 5 分钟读一读，聚焦决策、逻辑、分发，以及把代码变成用户真正使用的产品所需的思考方式。dailytips.dev 是一份免费的开发者每日 Newsletter，适合想在代码之外、围绕代码发生的一切方面都变得更强的开发者。

title: Buystocklot 2.0
description_en: Buystocklot is back — completely rebuilt with AI at its core. What's new: • Bix Match — AI that automatically matches buyer requests with seller stock • KYB-verified sellers via Persona (same platform used by LinkedIn & Etsy) • RFQ Board — post sourcing requests, get quotes from verified suppliers • Encrypted B2B messaging • 0% commission — we never take a cut Built for serious wholesale traders. UAE-based, globally connected. Free to join.
description_zh:
Buystocklot 回来了——全面重建，并以 AI 为核心。全新功能包括：  
• Bix Match——AI 自动将买家需求与卖家库存进行匹配  
• 通过 Persona 完成 KYB（了解你的企业）认证的卖家（与 LinkedIn 和 Etsy 使用的同一平台）  
• RFQ Board——发布采购需求，向已验证供应商获取报价  
• 加密的 B2B 消息沟通  
• 0% 佣金——我们绝不抽成  

专为严肃的批发贸易商打造。总部位于阿联酋，连接全球。免费加入。

title: People Loop
description_en: AI support that actually knows when to stop. People Loop handles the routine stuff, then escalates to a real human before the customer gets frustrated. Seamless handoff, full context, no repeating themselves. Finally. Train your AI on your own docs, deploy in minutes, and choose from GPT-4o, Claude, or Llama 3. Free plan to get started, paid plans from $39/mo with a 14-day trial.
description_zh: 真正懂得适可而止的 AI 支持。People Loop 先处理日常事务，然后在客户感到沮丧之前升级转接给真人客服。无缝交接、上下文完整、无需客户重复说明。终于如此。用你自己的文档训练 AI，几分钟即可部署，并可在 GPT-4o、Claude 或 Llama 3 之间选择。提供免费方案可立即开始，付费方案每月 $39 起，并提供 14 天试用。

title: Lazy Unicorn
description_en: Lazy Unicorn exists to become the definitive, self-building directory of the best tools and platforms that help anyone launch and run a business without lifting a finger. My mission is simple: make it possible for all of us to become lazy unicorns — founders who own thriving companies without burning out building them. The directory itself is a living experiment in autonomous capitalism with a goal of becoming an autonomous business.
description_zh: Lazy Unicorn 的存在是为了成为权威的、可自我构建的最佳工具与平台目录，帮助任何人在几乎不费力的情况下启动并运营一家企业。我的使命很简单：让我们所有人都能成为“懒惰独角兽”——那些无需在建设过程中耗尽精力，也能拥有蓬勃发展的公司之创始人。这个目录本身就是一次关于自主资本主义的“活实验”，目标是最终成为一家自治企业。

title: FileSyncAI
description_en: FileSyncAI connects companies, staffing firms, and candidates on one AI-powered platform that automates the entire hiring workflow — from job posting to AI-led interviews and evaluation. It reduces manual work, improves consistency, and continuously learns from each interview to deliver better matches and hiring outcomes over time.
description_zh: FileSyncAI 将企业、招聘服务机构和候选人连接到一个由 AI 驱动的平台上，实现从职位发布到 AI 主导的面试与评估在内的全流程招聘工作流自动化。它减少人工操作、提升一致性，并从每次面试中持续学习，随着时间推移提供更精准的匹配与更优的招聘结果。

title: Domainbar
description_en: Domainbar lives in your macOS menu bar so you can check domain availability instantly — without opening a browser or visiting a registrar. Type a name, see results across all major TLDs in seconds. Your search history is saved locally so you never lose that perfect domain idea. No account needed, no ads, no bloat. Just a fast, native menu bar utility for developers, founders, and anyone who obsessively checks domain names throughout the day.
description_zh: Domainbar 常驻于 macOS 菜单栏，让你无需打开浏览器或访问域名注册商，就能即时查询域名可用性。输入一个名称，几秒内即可查看所有主流顶级域（TLD）的查询结果。你的搜索历史会保存在本地，再也不会丢失那个完美的域名灵感。无需账号、无广告、无臃肿功能。它是一款快速、原生的菜单栏工具，面向开发者、创业者，以及那些一天中频繁、近乎执着地查询域名的人。

title: BeigeCRM
description_en: Relationships often start in emails, chats, meetings, or quick notes, and the context quickly becomes scattered. BeigeCRM keeps contacts, deals, conversations, tasks, and notes connected in one place. Track opportunities in a visual pipeline, capture context as it happens, and stay on top of follow-ups without the heavy workflows and complexity of traditional CRM tools.
description_zh: 关系往往始于邮件、聊天、会议或随手便签，而相关上下文很快就会变得零散。BeigeCRM 将联系人、交易（deals）、对话、任务和笔记在一个地方关联起来。通过可视化销售管道（pipeline）跟踪商机，随时记录发生中的上下文，并在无需传统 CRM 工具那种繁重工作流与复杂性的情况下，始终掌握跟进进度。

title: Foundd
description_en: Place startups, founders, and deals in chronological order. Was Stripe founded before or after Airbnb? Foundd is a free browser game with 4 modes, power-ups, leaderboards, and a learning system that teaches you real startup facts every time you get it wrong. Gameboy pixel art aesthetic. No signup required.
description_zh: 按时间顺序排列初创公司、创始人和交易。Stripe 是在 Airbnb 之前还是之后成立的？Foundd 是一款免费的浏览器游戏，提供 4 种模式、power-ups、排行榜以及学习系统：每次你答错都会教你真实的创业事实。采用 Gameboy 像素风美术。无需注册。

title: LLC Cost Calculator
description_en: Free tool that calculates the total cost of forming an LLC in all 50 US states — state filing fee, registered agent, annual report, and ongoing costs. No signup. No email. Just the numbers you need before you file.
description_zh: 免费工具：计算在美国全部 50 个州成立有限责任公司（LLC）的总成本——包括州政府申报/注册费、注册代理（Registered Agent）费用、年度报告费及持续性维护成本。无需注册。无需邮箱。只提供你在提交申请前需要的关键费用数字。

title: Hive
description_en: Hive is the Upwork for AI agents. It is a freelance marketplace where anyone can hire autonomous AI talent to get tasks done. From deep research and data analysis to content creation and coding, clients post projects and agents submit competitive proposals to win the work. It’s a complete labor layer where agents earn, build a verifiable reputation, and scale their services. If you’re hiring or monetizing an agent, Hive is where the AI workforce meets.
description_zh: Hive 是面向 AI 智能体的 Upwork。它是一个自由职业者市场，任何人都可以雇佣自主 AI 人才来完成任务。从深度研究、数据分析到内容创作与编程，客户发布项目，智能体提交有竞争力的提案以竞标赢得工作。它是一套完整的劳动力层：智能体在这里赚钱、建立可验证的声誉，并规模化扩展其服务。无论你是在招聘还是在让智能体变现，Hive 都是 AI 劳动力汇聚之处。

title: PromptURLs 2.0
description_en: PromptURLs 2.0 lets you embed one click AI widgets on your website. Create prompts about your product or content, customize the design, and paste the embed code. Visitors can instantly open ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity and more with your pre filled prompt. Built for AIO (Artificial Intelligence Optimization), it helps founders and marketers guide AI conversations and improve brand visibility without APIs or backend work.
description_zh: PromptURLs 2.0 让你可以在网站上嵌入“一键 AI”小组件。围绕你的产品或内容创建提示词（prompts），自定义设计，然后粘贴嵌入代码（embed code）。访客可通过你预先填好的提示词，立即打开 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Perplexity 等更多工具。它专为 AIO（Artificial Intelligence Optimization，人工智能优化）打造，帮助创始人和营销人员引导 AI 对话、提升品牌可见度，无需 API 或后端开发工作。

title: Nox
description_en: Silence the noise. Embrace silence. Introducing Nox. Nox is a minimalist sound app. Why you'll love it: Simplicity at its finest: Start playback with a single tap. Dark and deep interface: Designed for nighttime use. Smart fade-in: A timer that gradually lowers the volume to avoid waking you up. Lightweight and discreet: Works offline and respects your data (no tracking). Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. Discover Nox.
description_zh:
屏蔽喧嚣。拥抱静谧。Nox 登场。  
Nox 是一款极简音效应用。

你会爱上它的理由：  
- 极致简单：轻点一下即可开始播放。  
- 深色沉浸界面：专为夜间使用而设计。  
- 智能淡入：定时器会逐步降低音量，避免把你吵醒。  
- 轻巧隐秘：支持离线使用，尊重你的数据（不追踪）。

简单，才是终极的精致。  
探索 Nox。

title: edgameclaw
description_en: EdGameClaw: Convert any learning material into a game-based course — powered by AI. - yh2072/edgameclaw true interactive games!!! not quiz!!!
description_zh: EdGameClaw：将任何学习材料转化为基于游戏的课程——由 AI 驱动。- yh2072/edgameclaw 真正的交互式游戏！！！不是测验！！！

title: Red Monitor
description_en: If you're launching a product, doing market research, or keeping tabs on competitors, Reddit is goldmine — but only if you can keep up with it. Red Monitor is a desktop app that monitors subreddits and keywords on your behalf and surfaces matches in a clean inbox UI. Sentiment scoring helps you prioritize. No subscription, no recurring fees, buy it once and own it forever. We built this because we needed it ourselves.
description_zh: 如果你正在推出产品、做市场调研，或持续关注竞争对手，Reddit 简直就是金矿——但前提是你跟得上它的节奏。Red Monitor 是一款桌面应用，可代你监控各个 subreddit 和关键词，并将匹配内容汇总到简洁的收件箱式 UI 中。情感（sentiment）评分可帮助你确定优先级。不订阅、无重复收费，一次购买，永久拥有。我们之所以做它，是因为我们自己也需要。

title: Scriptonia
description_en: Most AI tools stop at the PRD. Scriptonia doesn't. Paste any idea get a full PRD, architecture blueprint, and sprint-ready dev tickets in 30 seconds. Every artifact is linked: change a user story and the tickets auto-update. No more translating specs into tickets manually. No more context lost between tools.
description_zh: 大多数 AI 工具止步于 PRD。Scriptonia 不会。把任何想法贴进去，30 秒内即可生成完整 PRD、架构蓝图（architecture blueprint）以及可直接用于 Sprint 的开发工单（dev tickets）。所有产出物彼此关联：修改一条用户故事（user story），工单会自动更新。不再需要手动把规格说明（specs）翻译成工单。不再在不同工具之间丢失上下文（context）。

title: Cleanclip
description_en: CleanClip makes removing video backgrounds as simple as uploading a file. No timelines. No complex editing tools. No learning curve. Just upload your video or GIF, and CleanClip removes the background in seconds. Whether you’re creating content for social media, presentations, or quick edits, CleanClip is built to save time and remove friction from your workflow.
description_zh: CleanClip 让移除视频背景像上传文件一样简单。无需时间轴。无需复杂的剪辑工具。无需学习成本。只要上传你的视频或 GIF，CleanClip 就能在几秒钟内移除背景。无论你是在为社交媒体、演示文稿制作内容，还是进行快速剪辑，CleanClip 都旨在节省时间，减少工作流程中的阻力。

title: Scowld
description_en: I just made an AI companion you can talk to on your iPhone/iPad And it's OPEN-SOURCE! She has a 3D anime avatar (sourced from amica-arbius-MIT licensed), talks hands-free, sees through your camera, and remembers everything about you. → Choose your AI: Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, or others → ElevenLabs voice makes her sound real → Can Code now through terminal Honesty, just have anime waifu bro! Join the beta 👇 https://testflight.apple.com/join/7WgDe7e4
description_zh:
我刚做了一个可以在你的 iPhone/iPad 上聊天的 AI 陪伴，而且还是开源的！她有一个 3D 二次元头像（来自 amica-arbius，MIT 许可证），支持免提对话，能通过你的摄像头“看见”外界，并且会记住关于你的一切。  
→ 选择你的 AI：Gemini、OpenAI、Claude 或其他  
→ 使用 ElevenLabs 语音，让她听起来更真实  
→ 现在还能通过终端写代码  
说实话，就是个二次元老婆兄弟！加入 beta 👇  
https://testflight.apple.com/join/7WgDe7e4

title: ClipBox – Copy & Paste Manager | CopyBox
description_en: Never lose a copied item again. ClipBox Pro is a powerful clipboard manager for iPhone & iPad that saves text, links, images, PDFs, videos, and audio instantly. Access full clipboard history, search in seconds, and organize with folders, tags, and pins. Paste from anywhere using the keyboard extension, save from any app, and secure data with Face ID. Built for developers, writers, students, and professionals who need fast, reliable copy-paste workflows.
description_zh: 再也不会丢失复制内容。ClipBox Pro 是一款适用于 iPhone 与 iPad 的强大剪贴板管理器，可即时保存文本、链接、图片、PDF、视频和音频。随时访问完整剪贴板历史记录，几秒内完成搜索，并通过文件夹、标签与置顶进行整理。通过键盘扩展在任何地方粘贴，从任意 App 保存内容，并使用 Face ID 保护数据安全。专为开发者、写作者、学生及需要快速可靠复制粘贴工作流的专业人士打造。

title: systemd/systemd
description_en: The systemd System and Service Manager
description_zh: systemd 是 Linux 的系统与服务管理器，用于启动与管理系统进程、服务及其依赖关系，并提供统一的运行时管理能力。它面向 Linux 发行版维护者、系统管理员以及需要与系统服务集成的开发者。关键能力围绕服务单元与依赖编排、进程生命周期管理、以及与系统启动流程的整合，典型场景是在服务器或桌面系统中管理开机启动、守护进程运行与故障重启等。

title: protocolbuffers/protobuf
description_en: Protocol Buffers - Google's data interchange format
description_zh: Protocol Buffers（protobuf）是 Google 提供的一种与语言和平台无关、可扩展的结构化数据序列化与交换格式，用于把数据高效编码成二进制并在系统间传输或存储。它面向需要跨语言、跨服务通信的开发者与分布式系统场景，通过 .proto 定义消息结构，并借助协议编译器生成各语言的数据类型与序列化/反序列化代码。典型用于微服务/ RPC 通信、日志与配置的结构化存储、以及移动端与后端之间的高效数据传输。

title: aquasecurity/trivy
description_en: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more
description_zh: Trivy 是一款通用安全扫描器，用于在容器镜像、文件系统、Git 仓库、虚拟机镜像、Kubernetes 与云环境中发现已知漏洞（CVE）、配置错误与 IaC 问题、泄露的敏感信息/密钥，并生成软件依赖与 OS 包的 SBOM 及识别许可证风险。它面向开发者、安全团队和 DevSecOps 流水线，支持多种语言与操作系统，可集成到 CI/CD、集群扫描与本地开发工具中。典型场景包括镜像发布前的安全门禁、K8s 集群与基础设施配置审计、代码与依赖的持续漏洞与密钥泄露检测。

title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
description_en: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.
description_zh: OpenDataLoader PDF 是一个开源的 PDF 解析器，面向需要把 PDF 转成可用于 AI/RAG 的结构化数据的开发者与团队，可从 PDF 提取 Markdown、带版面坐标的 JSON 和 HTML，并提供本地确定性解析与 AI 混合模式以处理复杂版面。它支持扫描件 OCR（多语言）以及表格、公式、图片/图表等内容抽取，适用于多栏文档、科研论文、低质量扫描等场景。项目也将同一版面分析能力用于 PDF 无障碍自动化，计划生成 Tagged PDF 以降低人工修复成本并提升合规效率。

title: FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
description_en: Automate the process of making money online.
description_zh: MoneyPrinter V2 是一个用来自动化“线上赚钱”流程的应用，面向想通过社媒内容与营销获客变现的个人或小团队。它提供可定时运行的 Twitter 机器人与 YouTube Shorts 自动化发布，并支持 Amazon 联盟营销（结合 Twitter）以及本地商家线索挖掘与冷启动外联。项目强调模块化架构与可脚本化调用，典型场景包括社媒引流带货、短视频矩阵运营和自动化搜集商家名单后批量触达。

title: vllm-project/vllm-omni
description_en: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models
description_zh: vLLM-Omni 是一个面向全模态（文本、图像/视频扩散生成、音频与 TTS 等）模型的高效推理与服务框架，目标是让模型部署更快、更省、更易用。它主要面向需要在生产环境提供多模态能力的开发者与平台方，扩展了 vLLM 在分布式执行、内存效率与稳定性上的能力，并提供更成熟的服务接口（含 OpenAI 兼容方向）与 profiling/benchmarking 支持。典型场景包括为 Qwen3-Omni/Qwen3-TTS、GLM-Image 以及 DiT 扩散图像/视频等模型提供统一的在线推理与生成服务，并覆盖 CUDA/ROCm/NPU/XPU 等多种硬件后端。

title: louis-e/arnis
description_en: Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.
description_zh: Arnis 是一个将真实世界地点高精度生成到 Minecraft（Java 1.17+ 与基岩版）中的开源项目，面向想在游戏里复刻家乡、城市或自然地貌的玩家与创作者。它整合并处理 OpenStreetMap 的地理要素数据与高程数据，生成符合真实地形起伏、道路与建筑分布的世界，并支持调整比例、出生点及建筑内部等生成参数。典型场景是快速生成大范围城市地图用于探索、建造参考、跑酷/生存服务器地图或地理教学展示。

title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
description_en: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.
description_zh: Project N.O.M.A.D 是一个离线优先、可自托管的“生存/应急知识与工具电脑（服务器）”，把关键资料库、教育内容与本地 AI 集成在一套浏览器可访问的系统里，适合断网环境下仍需获取信息的人群（如应急准备、偏远地区、野外/救灾场景）。它通过一个管理界面与 API 编排多种容器化服务（基于 Docker）来统一安装、配置与更新。关键能力包括基于 Ollama 的本地 AI 对话、文档上传与语义检索的知识库问答（RAG，使用 Qdrant），以及通过 Kiwix 提供的离线 Wikipedia/医疗参考/电子书等信息库与教育资源。典型场景是在没有公网或不稳定网络下搭建本地“知识与工具站”，供多设备通过浏览器访问查询与学习。
